title: Golden Potato
description: Highly customizable mod that adds golden vegetable variants with command powers for players and mod pack developers
body:
This highly configurable mod is made with modpacks in mind and attempts to remedy a long-standing balance issue: the /back, /home, and (to a lesser extent) /rtp commands. These commands, while useful, often cheapen deaths and encourage a riskier playstyle that some modpack devs and players may not like.



Introducing: the golden potato.

![GP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/030b8668d3b904b170643c9e40d5d983c74b03b1.png)


When consumed, this will teleport the user back to their last death. By default, it is crafted with a potato surrounded in gold (similar to other vanilla golden foods). It can be configured to cost gold-blocks (enchanted-variant), to be uncraftable and only available as loot, or disabled entirely. These configs are true for all three foods in this mod.


![GS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7b5085b1d03817e9921bc42f9ec0e32730be0d4.png)


The golden spud, crafted using a poisonous potato and an emerald in addition to gold, teleports the player to the last bed they slept in.


![GS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf7b75b5d37d1c5a7a23c8f0ca7c2f6602e2d73a.png)


The golden chorus fruit randomly teleports you somewhere safe within 5000 blocks.



The golden potato can be found in villages; the golden spud in ancient cities; and the golden chorus fruit in end cities (configurable). I would highly suggest you read the config file for this mod as there are other factors as well that can be changed.



For issues, please leave a comment on Github.
